meta.title: Alexandra Porhansl — Full-Stack Developer · Vue / Nuxt · Mulhouse
meta.description: Full-stack developer with a strong front-end and design leaning (Vue, Nuxt, TypeScript, Symfony, UI/UX), 7 years of experience. Based in Mulhouse, France — Basel, Freiburg and Zurich within reach. Freelance or permanent.

hero.eyebrow: Mulhouse · Basel 35 min · Freiburg 50 min · Zurich 1 h 50
hero.stack: front in vue and nuxt · back in symfony and nest · 7 years

status.fl: Available for web and mobile projects, remote or hybrid
status.cdi: Open to permanent roles around Mulhouse and across the border
status.geo: French, English, German · and happy to travel

value.title: What I bring
value.intro: Over seven years I've worked across very different industries. The main thing I've taken from it: writing the code is usually the easy part. The real work is understanding what people actually need, then properly shipping it.

s1.d: I always start by asking questions. Lots of them — to the client, or to the team when the need comes from inside. What comes out is a spec where everyone knows what to do, and in what order.

s2.t: I design as much as I code
s2.d: I come from the front end and I genuinely care about design. Figma mockups, an eye for detail, interfaces that hold together: I don't just implement a design, I shape it.

s3.t: With AI, I start with the plan
s3.d: I never let an agent loose blindly. I write a development plan first, and that changes everything: I stay in control and move much faster. It also makes me very adaptable — I can pick up a language I don't use daily without starting from scratch. And I care about clean code: Prettier, shared conventions, tests. AI doesn't remove the need for standards, it makes them more necessary.

s4.t: I take it all the way to production
s4.d: Specs, development, QA, release and the follow-up afterwards. I debug web and mobile alike, and that's often where a project is won or lost.

bullets.t: moved a CSHTML / jQuery codebase to Vue.js.
major releases built with Ionic and Angular, shipped to Google Play & the App Store.
built and deployed a complete website with Nuxt.js.
contributed to the PrestaShop 1.6 to 8.2 upgrade.
tracked down complex bugs, improved platform stability and performance.
led the Vue.js / TypeScript front end.
Swift development for a large part of the mission, through to the app's public release.
designed SaaS interfaces for a vehicle fleet management product.
set up Prettier and shared conventions, acceptance tests with Codeception.
worked with Docker and Git-based CI/CD.
custom solutions built with Symfony 3/4/5 and PHP.
built and maintained a portfolio of WordPress sites.
administered Windows Server and Linux machines.

mob.title: Mobility
mob.text: I live in Mulhouse and I drive, so getting around the region is easy. Basel, Freiburg, Zurich and Strasbourg are all within reach. On-site, hybrid or remote — whatever works best for you.
mob.mapAria: Travel-time map from Mulhouse: Colmar 30 min, Basel 35 min, Belfort 40 min, Freiburg 50 min, Montbéliard 50 min, Strasbourg 55 min, Zurich 1 h 50

en.name: English
en.note: I understand it well and practise every day, still getting better

cta.fl: Tell me about your project — I usually reply the same day.
cta.cdi: Drop me a line, I reply quickly. My CV is available in French and English.
